warnings: Supercooled conformal FOPTs face transition-completion/percolation risk; fopt-agent must verify the transition completes (P_false percolation, Gamma/H^4) and not assume nucleation implies completion.
chi0 scan range [1e-4, 1e2] GeV is broad; PTA-band literature anchors (2109.11558) sit near MeV scale (chi0 ~ 1e-3 to 1e0 GeV). Range is permissive, not wrong.
Backend uses high-temperature expansion of the thermal potential; its validity degrades in deep supercooling (small Tn/chi0). Documented backend approximation.
approximations: Scalar self-loop back-reaction on beta_lambda neglected (verified <0.04% at g=1.37); gb_scalar=sqrt(beta_lambda) added self-consistently by backend.
One-loop CW + high-T thermal potential as implemented in backend/semianalytic_pipeline.py.

validation_gauge_groups.notes: Non-abelian dark gauge group, coupling g. No fermions, so no gauge or mixed gauge-gravitational anomalies are possible. Fully broken by the doublet vev: no light non-abelian remnant, consistent with perturbative (non-confining) treatment.

validation_global_symmetries.notes: Lagrangian contains no dimensionful parameter; potential is pure quartic lambda(Phi^dag Phi)^2 with no mu^2 term. Scale invariance broken radiatively via Coleman-Weinberg dimensional transmutation. Consistent.

validation_global_symmetries.item: Accidental custodial SO(4)~SU(2)xSU(2) of single-doublet quartic
validation_global_symmetries.notes: Genuine accidental global symmetry of one complex doublet with a single quartic; not gauged, no consequence for FOPT. Informational.

validation_particle_content.item: Complex SU(2)_D doublet Phi (4 real dof)
validation_particle_content.notes: Spin 0, fundamental of SU(2)_D, 4 real dof. dof bookkeeping consistent.

Three massive dark vectors x 3 polarizations = 9 dof after SSB. dof balance: before SSB 4(scalar)+3x2(massless vectors)=10; after 1(radial)+3x3(massive vectors)=10. Goldstone count consistent (3 eaten).
Single physical radial scalar, mass fixed by CW relation m_chi^2 = beta_lambda*chi0^2 > 0. Added automatically by backend; must not be double-counted in boson_dofs.

validation_lagrangian_terms.notes: D_mu Phi=(d_mu - i g sigma^a/2 W^a_mu)Phi; gauge invariant. Source of gauge-boson masses.

validation_lagrangian_terms.item: Gauge kinetic -1/4 W^a_{mu nu} W^{a mu nu}

validation_lagrangian_terms.notes: Only quartic permitted by classical scale invariance; no mu^2 term. Consistent with conformal symmetry and CW breaking.

validation_free_parameters.notes: Dark gauge coupling; controls FOPT strength/supercooling. Upper bound preserves one-loop perturbativity. Literature anchor g_D=1.37 lies near the upper edge.
Symmetry-breaking scale / GW peak frequency. Range is broad; PTA-band fits cluster near MeV (chi0 ~ 1e-3 to 1 GeV). Permissive but not inconsistent.
Correctly dependent: CW-fixed, renormalization-scale dependent, never scanned. Not used by backend. Matches schema requirement that CW-fixed quartics are dependent.

independent.chi0: Scalar radial vev in GeV (symmetry-breaking scale).

dependent.beta_lambda: 1/(8 pi^2)(sum_B dof*gb^4 - sum_F dof*gf^4) = (9*(g/2)^4 + gb_scalar^4)/(8 pi^2). Verified >0.
dependent.gb_scalar: sqrt(beta_lambda); negligible back-reaction, added self-consistently by backend.

fixed.scalar_dof: 1 (radial mode; injected automatically by backend get_scalar_mass()).

validation_assumptions.item: Dark sector in thermal equilibrium with SM bath (xi=1)
validation_assumptions.notes: Common temperature assumption; matches backend default. Downstream may revisit xi if BBN/Neff constraints bite.
Required condition for radiative SSB and positive m_chi^2 is satisfied identically. Verified numerically.

validation_ssb_pattern.item: SU(2)_D -> nothing via single doublet vev
validation_ssb_pattern.notes: A single fundamental vev of SU(2) breaks the group completely (no unbroken generator leaves the vev invariant). All 3 gauge bosons massive, 3 Goldstones eaten. vev convention Phi=(1/sqrt2)(0,chi)^T correctly identifies the broken vacuum and is consistent with the SSB pattern.

validation_vev_convention.notes: Standard SU(2)-doublet convention with the 1/sqrt(2). Yields m_W=g*chi/2, consistent with literature M_ZD=g_D M/2 (2109.11558). Single real background direction chi.

validation_tree_level_potential.notes: Pure quartic along radial direction, no mass term. Consistent with the doublet potential under the stated vev convention.

validation_field_dependent_masses.notes: Derived from doublet kinetic term: all three SU(2) gauge bosons degenerate at m_W=g*chi/2. gb=g/2 and dof=9 consistent. SymPy-compatible string 'g**2 * chi**2 / 4'.
CW radial mode; gb fixed self-consistently. Backend injects this automatically (get_scalar_mass); must not be added to boson_dofs by hand. SymPy-compatible string 'beta_lambda * chi**2'.

validation_thermal_masses.item: W_D Debye/thermal mass via backend high-T coefficient
validation_thermal_masses.notes: Backend get_coeffs reconstructs msq = T^2/12 * sum_B dof*gb^2 internally from gb and dof of each bosonic species; no separate numeric thermal-mass input required. Consistent with backend interface. The proposer placeholder string 'g**2*T**2*(n_dof_factor)' is descriptive only and not consumed numerically.

validation_backend_compatibility.notes: boson_gbs={'Wprime': g/2}, boson_dofs={'Wprime': 9}, no fermions. Backend get_beta_lambda computes (sum_B dof*gb^4 - sum_F dof*gf^4)/(8 pi^2) and adds the scalar (dof=1, gb=m_chi/chi0) in __init__. Verified beta_lambda>0 and self-consistent (scalar back-reaction <0.04% at g=1.37). Single-field classically scale-invariant regime = exactly the backend's domain of validity.

warnings: Branch viability (not a Lagrangian inconsistency): supercooled conformal FOPT may fail to complete (percolation/false-vacuum domination). fopt-agent must check transition completion, not just nucleation.
chi0 range is broad relative to PTA-band literature anchors (~MeV). fopt/pta agents should focus near chi0 ~ 1e-3 to 1 GeV.
High-T expansion validity degrades in deep supercooling; inherited backend approximation.
